206.reason: [Incorrectly assumes "&&" is always present; should first check if next character is '&'. If not, it's a single '&' which is an error, but the token should not be added as "&&".]

214.reason: [Incorrectly assumes "||" is always present; should first check if next character is '|'. If not, it's a single '|' which is an error, but the token should not be added as "||".]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly assumes "||" is always present; should first check if next character is '|'. If not, it's a single '|' which is an error, but the token should not be added as "||".]
